body.title: D327 Phase 1: ollama_reasoner + cluster_router → inference_ollama.py
body.result: inference_ollama.py + inference_openrouter.py created as canonical modules. All 14 external import sites migrated. cluster_router + ollama_reasoner still contain the code (re-exported). server.py _health_cache stays on cluster_router (mutable alias issue). 1875 tests pass.
body.description: Move ollama_reasoner.py to inference_ollama.py, absorb cluster_router.py health/routing. Strip model names — expose by tier/call_type. Update all imports. Tests must pass.
